title: Update tag/releases in the buildah repo to match available buildah releases
body:
**Description**
Currently the latest version/release of buildah defined in this repository is 0.12, but three additional versions have been released.

https://github.com/projectatomic/buildah/releases

**Describe the results you received:**
0.12 is the latest version defined in the repository

**Describe the results you expected:**
0.15 to be the latest version

Tags pulled from the repo that appear to align with the newer releases:
```
0.13 ef0ca9cd2d69e8ca70d07e19386c676ae4985644 (23 Feb 2018)
0.14 ee11d75f3e9bf68d0763ffcea6d0cfc3f88146ef (27 Feb 2018)
0.15 d1330a5c4680dd18e1d58015f94cb3530c248eb9 (27 Feb 2018)
```

comments.body: V0.14 and V0.15 should be there now.
